author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
CAPTAIN TSUBASA 2: WORLD FIGHTERS – Pre-order Trailer – Nintendo Switch
Pre-order CAPTAIN TSUBASA 2: WORLD FIGHTERS now and earn exclusive rewards when the game releases on Aug 28, 2026 on Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/captain-tsubasa-2-world-fighters-switch/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

Experience the thrill of soccer with over 110 playable characters and new super moves! Challenge a friend on the field or support Tsubasa on his journey. Your road to the top of the world starts here!  

#CaptainTsubasa2WorldFighters 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot
